concerns.text: FR-007 mandates a fallback to 'dependency graph topology' for categorization when keywords are missing. Task T028 only mentions implementing the classifier 'using package metadata keywords' and does not explicitly task the implementation of the topology fallback logic, leaving this requirement uncovered.

SC-006 requires measuring statistical power (target ≥ 0.8) against the sample size. No task in Phase 4 (US-2) or Phase 5 (US-3) explicitly implements a power analysis calculation or verification step to confirm this criterion is met.

SC-002 requires measuring the proportion of dependencies with missing release metadata against the total dataset size. While T017 handles missing metadata, no specific task is assigned to calculate and report this proportion as a distinct success criterion metric.

SC-004 requires measuring API request success vs. failure rates. While T007 sets up logging and T005 implements backoff, no task explicitly aggregates these logs to calculate and report the success/failure ratio as a required output.

SC-003 requires measuring the variance in correlation coefficients across categories against the overall dataset. T029 computes per-category coefficients, but no task explicitly calculates the variance or performs the comparative measurement required by SC-003.
